insights.frost: Frost risk: protect young plants and irrigation lines.
insights.wind: Strong wind: postpone spraying until it calms.
insights.rain: Rain likely: check drainage and field access.
insights.ok: Weather looks reasonable for routine field work.
insights.soilEmpty: Add soil lab data to get crop suitability hints.
insights.soilPartial: Add at least pH (and organic matter % or texture) for better recommendations.
insights.suitableCrops: Planning hint — crops to discuss with your agronomist: %{crops}.

regional.tropical: Humid / tropical tendency: intense sun, pests and fungal pressure are common — scout often and plan irrigation carefully.
regional.arid: Dry / arid tendency: prioritise water efficiency, mulching and drought-tolerant species or rootstocks.
regional.continental: Continental tendency: watch spring frosts, winter hardiness and uneven rainfall across the season.

regionalCrops.title: Best matches for your region
regionalCrops.subtitle: Ranked by location, climate and your filters.

reason.phNeutral: pH in a range many tree and row crops tolerate.
reason.phAcid: More acidic: liming plan may be needed; some acid-tolerant crops fit better.
reason.phAlkaline: More alkaline: micronutrient availability can be tricky — validate with soil tests.
reason.organicHigh: Higher organic matter: good water retention and biology.
reason.organicLow: Low organic matter: consider organic inputs or cover crops.
reason.textureClay: Heavy texture: drainage and traffic timing matter.
reason.textureSandy: Light texture: irrigation frequency usually increases.
reason.textureLoam: Balanced texture: versatile for many cropping systems.
reason.climateArid: Matches dry-climate planting lists (verify water rights).
reason.climateTropical: Matches humid warm-climate options (verify disease pressure).
reason.generic: General planning suggestion — confirm with local extension / agronomist.

tasks.frostCover: Frost risk: prepare row covers / wind machines plan
tasks.sprayWindowOk: Wind allows a spraying window if other rules are met
tasks.drainCheck: Before rain: inspect drainage and berms
tasks.fungusWatch: High humidity: watch fungal spots on foliage
tasks.soilEnterData: Enter soil pH / lab results for tailored hints

planting.m1: Establishment: confirm root zone moisture after planting
planting.m7: Week 1: check staking / guards and first irrigation cycle
planting.m30: ~1 month: review weed line and starter nutrition plan
planting.m90: ~3 months: canopy / growth check; adjust fertigation if used
planting.m180: ~6 months: mid-season structure prune or training (crop-specific)
planting.walnut.d14: Walnut: inspect graft union and collar rot signs
planting.walnut.d60: Walnut: plan first structured irrigation audit
planting.walnut.y1: Year 1: winter damage survey before dormancy breaks
planting.prePlant: Planting planned for %{date} — prep field and inputs accordingly.
planting.planComplete: Recorded milestones for this season look complete — keep scouting.

farm.costPerM2Pending: Add area (m²) to compute unit cost
farm.cropHintsIntro: Heuristic suggestions only — always validate with soil tests and a local agronomist.
farm.addParcelHint: Optional extra blocks (e.g. rented land). Areas add to total m².
farm.noParcels: No extra parcels yet — totals use the main field only.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHint: Choose the app language. Manual override of auto-detection.
settings.categoriesHint: Recommendations and alerts come from the selected categories.
settings.segmentsHint: Suggestions are filtered by greenhouse, open field, orchard, or hydroponic preference.
settings.nicheHint: Suggest alternative / global crops when climate allows.
